Apache Juneau
  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Use
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Help

Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.commons.collections

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.commons.collections
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.collections
Enhanced collection utilities that extend the standard Java Collections Framework with fluent APIs, specialized collection types, and caching capabilities.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.io
File and stream utilities, console support, MIME type detection, and path builders for working with files and I/O operations.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
Simple Variable Language
org.apache.juneau.commons.utils
Common internal utilities.
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.config.store
Configuration Storage Support
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header
HTTP Header Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part
HTTP Part Beans
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp
Classpath Utilities
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
HTTP Part Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal
Internal Utilities
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.utils
URL-Encoding Annotations
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock
REST Server Mock API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug
REST Debug APIs
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger
REST Logging API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Method exec stats utilities
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util
REST Server Utilities
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.collections used by org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
    Class
    Description
    FluentMap
    A fluent wrapper around an arbitrary map that provides convenient methods for adding entries.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.collections used by org.apache.juneau.commons.collections
    Class
    Description
    BidiMap
    A bidirectional map with reverse key lookup by value.
    BidiMap.Builder
    Builder class for BidiMap.
    Cache
    Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by key.
    Cache.Builder
    Builder for creating configured Cache instances.
    Cache2
    Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by two-part keys.
    Cache2.Builder
    Builder for creating configured Cache2 instances.
    Cache3
    Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by three-part keys.
    Cache3.Builder
    Builder for creating configured Cache3 instances.
    Cache4
    Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by four-part keys.
    Cache4.Builder
    Builder for creating configured Cache4 instances.
    Cache5
    Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by five-part keys.
    Cache5.Builder
    Builder for creating configured Cache5 instances.
    CacheMode
    Cache modes for Cache and related cache classes.
    ControlledArrayList
    An ArrayList that allows you to control whether it's read-only via a constructor parameter.
    FilteredList
    A list wrapper that filters elements based on a Predicate when they are added.
    FilteredList.Builder
    Builder for creating FilteredList instances.
    FilteredMap
    A map wrapper that filters entries based on a BiPredicate when they are added.
    FilteredMap.Builder
    Builder for creating FilteredMap instances.
    FilteredSet
    A set wrapper that filters elements based on a Predicate when they are added.
    FilteredSet.Builder
    Builder for creating FilteredSet instances.
    FluentList
    A fluent wrapper around an arbitrary list that provides convenient methods for adding elements.
    FluentMap
    A fluent wrapper around an arbitrary map that provides convenient methods for adding entries.
    FluentSet
    A fluent wrapper around an arbitrary set that provides convenient methods for adding elements.
    HashKey
    Represents a composite key composed of multiple values, suitable for use as a key in hash-based collections.
    Lists
    A fluent builder for constructing List instances with various configuration options.
    Maps
    A fluent builder for constructing Map instances with various configuration options.
    Sets
    A fluent builder for constructing Set instances with various configuration options.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.collections used by org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
    Class
    Description

    A fluent wrapper around an arbitrary map that provides convenient methods for adding entries.
